knownIncidents.title: SPL_ERC20.transfer reverts on fresh recipient (pre-PR #63)
knownIncidents.summary: Wrappers built before rome-solidity PR #63 reverted with 'Token account does not exist' when sending to a fresh wallet. Fix is in master; new wrappers compile clean. If this is observed on a wrapper here, the wrapper itself needs replacement.

knownIncidents.title: Atomic DoTx with 2+ CPIs exceeds Solana's 1.4M CU budget
knownIncidents.summary: Outbound Wormhole was originally a single EVM tx that did SPL Approve + transfer_wrapped — exceeded the compute budget. Split across two EVM txs (approveBurnETH then burnETH). Same budget applies to any atomic flow on Marcus.
